propositions: The plan-review sidecar's coaching block persists only {move_id, finding_refs}, dropping move_name, subject, and the rendered coaching prose.
Downstream audit UIs cannot reconstruct or re-render coaching notes because subject and prose are not persisted, violating the epic's lossless-capture goal for pass-4.
The fix widens the plan-review build_payload coaching projection to the full verdict shape {move_id, move_name, subject, finding_refs, coaching}, schema-tolerant with missing fields yielding None.
The change is purely additive to plan_review_result_v2 with no schema version bump; existing readers ignore extra fields and older records remain readable.
The code-review sidecar already persists the full coaching array verbatim and needs only a regression test to lock in the lossless property.
